div.div:
• Asynchronous sending
• Standardized transmitted packet
• Delivery-state feedback
• Measurable bandwidth reduction (vs original audio)

• Local pre-processing
• Retry support for failures
• Transcript shown before transmission
• Privacy (discard raw audio)
• Low end-to-end latency
